chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P. No. D- 169 of 2019 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on o/objection 2.For hearing of main case 17-11-2022 Mr. Shahriyar I. Awan, Assistant A.G. ***** None present for the petitioner. Through instant petition, the petitioner seeks directions to the respondents No.3 to 6, who are officials of revenue department to conduct joint measurement and demarcation of the land bearing survey No.966 to 1010 situated in Deh Nebahoo Patta Taluka Kotdiji-Khairpur. Appropriate and efficacious remedy is available to the petitioner under the Sindh Revenue Act. Hence, this petition being not maintainable under the law is hereby dismissed accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
